params.TriggerDescription: At the beginning of each player's upkeep, that player gains control of NICKNAME, untaps it, and puts a +1/+1 counter on it. It gains haste until end of turn.

params.Description: CARDNAME attacks each combat if able, can't be sacrificed, and can't attack its owner.
